title: Herbal Crisp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with crisp vegetables and vermicelli noodles, flavored with herbal notes.
instructions: Cook vermicelli noodles according to package instructions.
Heat a tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the crisp and stir-fry until slightly softened.
Add the herbal and stir-fry for another minute.
Combine the cooked vermicelli noodles with the crisp and herbal mixture.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until well combined.
